About Me

Hello, I'm Aniket, a creative technologist working at the intersection of 3D art, Love Python Programming, and a wanna be Ai engineer. I enjoy building visual experiences, experimenting with new technologies, and turning complex ideas into creative digital projects.

3D Artist

Ketcies3D

Precision-focused 3D artist specialising in complex articulated joint models and high-detail client work. I thrive where geometry gets complicated — turning technical briefs into production-ready 3D assets.

3D Printwise 3D Artist — Full Time

Working on complex models and precision engineering for clients across two branches — United Kingdom & India. Specialising in articulated joints and technically demanding geometries.
